dimensions.note: Change is a dedup refactor onto the generated _lib/stackset.ts twin. Credential resolution semantics are byte-equivalent: apiFromGlobals now calls the shared selectCredentials(profile), which returns fromIni({profile}) for a non-empty profile and undefined (ambient chain) otherwise — exactly the inline branch it replaced. No new credential paths, env reads, vault references, or sensitive logging. The twin is self-contained and does not pull in the fleet SSO machinery.

No logging calls added or changed; runAudit keeps its structured entry/completion info logs with placeholder syntax. The shared twin logs nothing itself (its onPoll seam is unused by this read-only package).

No error-handling paths changed. The audit method has no poll loop; the only functional substitutions are selectCredentials (same branch) and STACKSET_RETRY (same {maxAttempts: 8} spread into the CloudFormation client). Data is still written only after all reads and derivations succeed.

Smoke suite (tests/aws_stackset_audit_smoke_test.ts) passes byte-for-byte unchanged — the behavior-preservation proof for the migration. The isoOrEmpty unit test moved to the canonical _lib/stackset_test.ts, which owns the shared-helper coverage (isoOrEmpty edges, credential-selection branches, STACKSET_RETRY pin) once; package tests keep all package-logic coverage (classification, rollups, verdict derivation, instanceKey). Full trio+_lib run: 108 passed / 0 failed.
Read-only audit model; the single audit method mutates no cloud state, so create/delete idempotency does not apply. Unchanged by this refactor.

No AWS API calls added, removed, or reordered; pagination in listStackInstances/listOperations is untouched. AwsOperationSummary is now the trio-shared type from the twin with identical fields to the deleted private copy (verified field-by-field in the diff), and it is re-exported so the existing test mocks compile against the same name.
No new handles, clients, or temp files. The CloudFormation client construction is unchanged apart from the renamed retry const.

The new twin _lib/stackset.ts carries only synthetic examples and no infrastructure identifiers; its generated header names the codegen script. Existing README/fixtures untouched. Module surface preserved: isoOrEmpty and AwsOperationSummary are re-exported from the twin, so previously-public symbols remain available.

Mechanical schema-write conformance re-verified: summary write covers every SummarySchema field and instance rows are typed InstanceRecord[] against InstanceRecordSchema; no schema or write-path changes in this refactor, no .passthrough(), no placeholder values. The shared GlobalArgs is a type only — the package keeps its own zod GlobalArgsSchema with its audit-specific describe() wording, unchanged.
Resource specs (summary, instance) retain lifetime infinite and garbageCollection 10; no spec added or altered.
Intentionally read-only audit model with a single fan-out audit method; no create/update/delete/sync lifecycle in scope. The colocated metadata test still asserts methods === ['audit'].
No mutating method exists, so preflight check labels do not apply; the audit method makes only read-only Describe/List calls.
Unchanged: instance rows keyed by instanceKey(account, region), summary by the fixed name summary; no new writeResource call or spec, so uniqueness within an execution is preserved.
No readResource or dataRepository access added or changed; all derivations remain over the in-memory instances array of the same run.

Version bumped 2026.06.23.1 -> 2026.07.04.1 (registry nextVersion) in manifest.yaml and model.version, with a matching final no-op upgrades entry (pass-through upgradeAttributes; no resource schema changes, so old persisted rows load unchanged). The colocated invariant tests assert manifest == model.version == upgrades.at(-1).toVersion and pass.
